winecidermead.name: Blackberry Wine
winecidermead.description: Sweet, tart, and irresistibly smooth — this blackberry wine is bursting with ripe berry flavor from start to finish. Each sip hits with a juicy pop of blackberry sweetness balanced by just the right touch of tangy tartness. Perfect for cozy fall evenings, dessert pairings, or anyone who loves a little fruit-forward flair in their glass.

winecidermead.name: Cardinal Rosé
winecidermead.description: Light, fruity blush‑colored rosé with strawberry notes—ideal for warm‑weather sipping.

winecidermead.name: Black Cherry Wine
winecidermead.description: This sweet ruby red wine presents succulent flavors of fresh ripe black cherries balanced by a subtle touch of tannins!

winecidermead.name: Bee City
winecidermead.description: Our flagship sparkling session mead made with WG Bee Farm's wildflower honey! It provides delicate tasting notes of sweet honey and floral undertones with an apple cider like finish! Name is in honor of both The City of Martinsville and The Town of Ridgeway being Bee City USA Affiliates.

winecidermead.name: White Zinfandel
winecidermead.description: Light and refreshing with notes of strawberry, watermelon, and a hint of citrus, finishing crisp and smooth.

winecidermead.name: Valroza
winecidermead.description: A smooth, medium-bodied red with rich notes of dark cherry, plum, and blackberry layered with subtle hints of cocoa and warm spice. Soft tannins and a balanced finish make it an easy-drinking red perfect for relaxing with friends or pairing with hearty foods.

winecidermead.name: Orange Blossom Mead
winecidermead.description: A mead made from Orange Blossom honey that has tasting notes of sweet honey and citrus upfront with floral undertones and a warming complex alcohol in the finish!

winecidermead.name: Orchard Drive
winecidermead.description: Our Flagship cider made with a blend of Macintosh and Granny Smith Apples. Crisp and refreshing, it highlights both the tartness and the sweetness of the apples.

winecidermead.name: Strawberry Wine
winecidermead.description: This wine is bursting with fresh, juicy berry flavor. Light, refreshing, and slightly tart with a smooth, sweet finish that keeps it easy to sip.

winecidermead.name: Maple Wine
winecidermead.description: A Sweet Maple Wine that has delicate tasting notes of maple, oak, and slightly floral and woody undertones! Made from 100% Grade B Maple Syrup!

winecidermead.name: Brochet Mead
winecidermead.description: Made using caramelized honey, this brochet mead has rich notes of chocolate, toasted marshmallow, and warm beeswax, with a smooth, roasted honey finish.

winecidermead.name: Grapefruit Mead
winecidermead.description: A semi-sweet Melomel mead with bright grapefruit citrus, balanced honey sweetness, and a light oak finish. Crisp, slightly tart, and refreshing.

winecidermead.name: Liebfraumilch
winecidermead.description: Liebfraumilch is a semi sweet German White Wine, known for being light to medium bodied with fruity flavors like peach, pear, and apple, and a hint of honeysuckle!

winecidermead.name: Lambrusco
winecidermead.description: A Sweet Italian Red wine with tasting notes of juicy cherry, plum, and blackberry. Smooth, jammy, sweet and easy drinking!

winecidermead.name: 2024 Bottled Blonde
winecidermead.description: A sweeter white wine made with 1000% Vidal. Soft but crisp. Also nice as a dessert wine.

winecidermead.name: 2024 Old Virginia Red
winecidermead.description: Old Virginia Red continues to be a crowd pleaser - smooth, light and great with food. The 2024 vintage features 100% Chambourcin.

winecidermead.name: Passion Fruit Tea Mead
winecidermead.description: A Sweet Melomel Mead bursting with tropical flavor and smooth tea character. Bright, juicy passion fruit up front with a mellow, slightly tannic finish that keeps it balanced and easy to drink.

winecidermead.name: Mango Dragon Fruit Lemonade
winecidermead.description: Features delicious flavors of mango, dragon fruit, coconut, and lemonade! Refreshing and bright, the essential spring and summer sipper!
